rag_rules: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
Do not use implementation-level subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Align helper declaration types with expression types in guarantees
Place implementation-level bindings in the implementation annex when valid
generic_rules: Trace the first unresolved identifier or invalid helper declaration when fixing type errors
Use only visible identifiers in guarantees and assignments
Avoid mixing implementation-level references in type-level contracts
Compare types in guarantees to ensure consistency
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `assign` only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable
Use `guarantee` only in component type annexes for visible output dependencies
Use `eq` for helper declarations and `const` for constants in annexes
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantees in implementation annexes
Do not use subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not mix implementation-level references in type-level contracts
Do not ignore type mismatches in guarantees
